description: Organize your chaotic inbox for two specific clients: 'Apache' (SpamAssassin work) and 'ILUG' (Irish Linux Users Group). Create a folder hierarchy consisting of a parent folder named 'Clients' with subfolders 'Apache' and 'ILUG'. Move at least 5 emails related to SpamAssassin/Apache to 'Clients/Apache' and flag or star them. Move at least 5 emails related to ILUG/Linux-Group to 'Clients/ILUG' and mark them as unread. Draft a status report email to 'billing@consultancy.firm' with the subject 'Weekly Triage Report' stating the number of emails filed for each client.
